# Pouya Mansournia

> Experimental navigation aid for language-model tools. This file is not required by Google and does not guarantee ranking, indexing, AI Overview inclusion, or citation.

Pouya Mansournia is a robotics systems architect and mechatronics engineer working across autonomous mobile robots, warehouse automation, embedded systems, precision mechanisms, product development, AI integration, and industrial automation.

## Canonical pages

- Home: https://mansournia.info/
- About: https://mansournia.info/about/
- Projects: https://mansournia.info/projects/
- Research and publications: https://mansournia.info/research/
- Engineering articles: https://mansournia.info/articles/
- Open-source systems: https://mansournia.info/open-source/
- Achievements: https://mansournia.info/achievements/
- Contact: https://mansournia.info/contact/

- GitHub: https://github.com/Pouya-Mansournia

- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@Pouyamansournia
